name: Generative Students: Using LLM-Simulated Student Profiles to Support Question Item Evaluation
summary: Learning @ Scale 2024 paper using GPT-4-simulated student profiles and responses to support preliminary multiple-choice question item evaluation, with comparison to real student responses.
version_note: arXiv page reviewed at version 2, revised 2024-05-24.

access_attempts.notes: arXiv HTML and PDF are available; arXiv HTML was used for prompt-architecture extraction.
